SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fastsimulation

Class KValueUnitProfile

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fastsimulation.KValueUnitProfile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class KValueUnitProfile extends Object implements Serializable
Frozen K-value and fallback split-factor profile for one process unit.

A two-outlet vapour/liquid unit stores one equilibrium ratio per component, K_i = y_i / x_i. A three-outlet gas/oil/water unit stores gas-over-oil and water-over-oil distribution ratios. During a fast rerun the unit computes new phase fractions from the incoming component vector and routes the component moles without calling an EOS flash. Units that cannot be represented by cached K-values use the frozen per-outlet component factors as a conservative fallback.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • KValueUnitProfile

      public KValueUnitProfile(String unitName, String equipmentType, List<StreamInterface> inletStreams, List<StreamInterface> outletStreams, String[] componentNames, double[][] fallbackSplitFactors, double[] vaporLiquidKValues, double[] waterLiquidKValues, int gasOutletIndex, int liquidOutletIndex, int waterOutletIndex, double[] baseInletComponentFlow)
      Creates a unit profile.
      Parameters:
      unitName - name of the unit; must be non-null
      equipmentType - simple class name of the unit; must be non-null
      inletStreams - inlet streams for the unit; must be non-null
      outletStreams - outlet streams for the unit; must be non-null
      componentNames - component slate used by the profile; must be non-null
      fallbackSplitFactors - frozen fallback factors indexed by outlet and component; must match the outlet and component counts
      vaporLiquidKValues - cached vapour/liquid or gas/oil K-values, or null for fallback-only units
      waterLiquidKValues - cached water/oil ratios, or null for two-phase or fallback-only units
      gasOutletIndex - gas outlet index, or -1 when fallback-only
      liquidOutletIndex - liquid outlet index, or -1 when fallback-only
      waterOutletIndex - water outlet index, or -1 when not using three-phase routing
      baseInletComponentFlow - base inlet component flow in mole/sec; must match the component count

  • Method Details

    • getUnitName

      public String getUnitName()
      Gets the unit name.
      Returns:
      unit name

    • getEquipmentType

      public String getEquipmentType()
      Gets the simple equipment type name.
      Returns:
      equipment type name

      Gets the unit inlet streams.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable inlet stream list

    • getOutletStreams

      public List<StreamInterface> getOutletStreams()
      Gets the unit outlet streams.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable outlet stream list

    • getComponentNames

      public String[] getComponentNames()
      Gets the component names used by this profile.
      Returns:
      copy of the component slate

    • getVaporLiquidKValues

      public double[] getVaporLiquidKValues()
      Gets a copy of the cached K-values.
      Returns:
      cached K-values, or null for fallback-only units

    • getWaterLiquidKValues

      public double[] getWaterLiquidKValues()
      Gets a copy of the cached water/liquid ratios.
      Returns:
      cached water/oil ratios, or null for non-three-phase units

    • usesKValueRouting

      public boolean usesKValueRouting()
      Reports whether the unit is routed with cached K-values.
      Returns:
      true when Rachford-Rice K-value routing is active

    • usesThreePhaseKValueRouting

      public boolean usesThreePhaseKValueRouting()
      Reports whether the unit is routed with three-phase cached K-values.
      Returns:
      true when gas/oil/water K-value routing is active

    • getBaseInletComponentFlow

      public double getBaseInletComponentFlow(int componentIndex)
      Gets the base-case inlet component flow.
      Parameters:
      componentIndex - component index in getComponentNames()
      Returns:
      inlet component flow in mole/sec

    • getOutletKey

      public String getOutletKey(int outletIndex)
      Gets a stable result key for one outlet stream.
      Parameters:
      outletIndex - outlet index in getOutletStreams()
      Returns:
      key formatted as unitName.outletStreamName

    • route

      double[][] route(double[] inletComponentFlow)
      Routes an inlet component vector to the unit outlets.
      Parameters:
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec; must match the component count
      Returns:
      outlet component molar flows indexed by outlet and component

    • routeWithThreePhaseKValues

      private double[][] routeWithThreePhaseKValues(double[] inletComponentFlow)
      Routes a component vector with cached gas/oil and water/oil ratios.
      Parameters:
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec
      Returns:
      outlet component molar flows indexed by outlet and component

    • routeWithKValues

      private double[][] routeWithKValues(double[] inletComponentFlow)
      Routes a component vector with cached K-values and a Rachford-Rice vapour fraction.
      Parameters:
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec
      Returns:
      outlet component molar flows indexed by outlet and component

    • routeWithFrozenFactors

      private double[][] routeWithFrozenFactors(double[] inletComponentFlow)
      Routes a component vector with frozen fallback split factors.
      Parameters:
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec
      Returns:
      outlet component molar flows indexed by outlet and component

    • solveVaporFraction

      private double solveVaporFraction(double[] inletComponentFlow, double total)
      Solves the two-phase vapour fraction for cached K-values.
      Parameters:
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec
      total - total molar flow in mole/sec
      Returns:
      vapour fraction in the range [0, 1]

    • solveThreePhaseFractions

      private double[] solveThreePhaseFractions(double[] inletComponentFlow, double total)
      Solves gas, oil, and water phase fractions for cached three-phase ratios.
      Parameters:
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec
      total - total molar flow in mole/sec
      Returns:
      phase fractions indexed gas, liquid, water, or null if no stable three-phase solution was found

    • threePhaseResidualAndJacobian

      private double[] threePhaseResidualAndJacobian(double vaporFraction, double waterFraction, double[] inletComponentFlow, double total)
      Evaluates three-phase residuals and Jacobian terms.
      Parameters:
      vaporFraction - trial vapour fraction
      waterFraction - trial water fraction
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec
      total - total molar flow in mole/sec
      Returns:
      array containing gas residual, water residual, and four Jacobian terms, or null for invalid denominators

    • isValidThreePhaseFractions

      private boolean isValidThreePhaseFractions(double vaporFraction, double waterFraction)
      Checks whether trial three-phase fractions are inside the feasible simplex.
      Parameters:
      vaporFraction - trial vapour fraction
      waterFraction - trial water fraction
      Returns:
      true when gas, oil, and water fractions are positive

    • threePhaseDenominatorsArePositive

      private boolean threePhaseDenominatorsArePositive(double vaporFraction, double waterFraction, double[] inletComponentFlow, double total)
      Checks whether three-phase denominators are positive for every present component.
      Parameters:
      vaporFraction - trial vapour fraction
      waterFraction - trial water fraction
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec
      total - total molar flow in mole/sec
      Returns:
      true when all denominators are positive

    • estimateBaseOutletFraction

      private double estimateBaseOutletFraction(int outletIndex)
      Estimates the base-case mole fraction routed to one outlet.
      Parameters:
      outletIndex - outlet index
      Returns:
      base-case outlet fraction, or 0.0 when unavailable

    • rachfordRiceFunction

      private double rachfordRiceFunction(double vaporFraction, double[] inletComponentFlow, double total)
      Evaluates the Rachford-Rice function.
      Parameters:
      vaporFraction - trial vapour fraction
      inletComponentFlow - component molar flows entering the unit in mole/sec
      total - total molar flow in mole/sec
      Returns:
      Rachford-Rice residual

    • clampK

      private double clampK(double value)
      Clamps a K-value to a finite positive range.
      Parameters:
      value - raw K-value
      Returns:
      clamped K-value

    • sum

      private double sum(double[] values)
      Sums the positive entries of an array.
      Parameters:
      values - values to sum
      Returns:
      positive-entry sum

    • copyMatrix

      private static double[][] copyMatrix(double[][] matrix)
      Copies a matrix defensively.
      Parameters:
      matrix - source matrix
      Returns:
      copied matrix
